name: agent-wallet
displayName: Agent Wallet — Non-custodial RWA service for AI
description: Connect this MCP and your AI can compare on-chain yields, quote tokenized US equities, and build ready-to-sign Solana transactions for buying / selling Backed xStocks (16 tickers — NVDAx, TSLAx, SPYx, QQQx, COINx, …) or depositing into Ondo USDY tokenized treasuries. Funds stay in your existing Phantom wallet — we never sign or custody.
tagline: Your AI's RWA + yield analyst on Solana. Non-custodial.
author: kadi

tools.name: compare_yields
tools.summary: Rank USDC lending + tokenized-treasury yields across chains, RISK-ADJUSTED (not headline APY). Returns topExecutable (best you can act on today) and topByRiskAdjustedOverall (global best, may be read-only in V1).

tools.name: quote_tokenized_stock
tools.summary: Live Jupiter quote for USDC → xStock, with a best-entry-timing signal (premium vs underlying).

tools.name: get_portfolio
tools.summary: Wallet snapshot (SOL / USDC / xStocks / yield tokens valued).

tools.name: portfolio_health
tools.summary: Should-I-do-anything check: holdings vs best risk-adjusted yield + per-xStock timing signal + actionable notes.

tools.name: suggest_rebalance
tools.summary: Given a target allocation, compute the buy/sell trades to reach it (read-only; user executes).

tools.name: export_history
tools.summary: Export a wallet's tokenized-equity/yield trade history (date/action/asset/price/CSV) — a record for the accountant, not tax advice.

tools.name: track_tx
tools.summary: On-chain confirmation status for a Solana signature.

tools.name: build_deposit_yield_tx
tools.summary: Construct unsigned USDC → USDY tx + sign URL.

tools.name: build_withdraw_yield_tx
tools.summary: Construct unsigned USDY → USDC tx + sign URL.

tools.name: build_buy_xstock_tx
tools.summary: Construct unsigned USDC → xStock tx + sign URL.

tools.name: build_sell_xstock_tx
tools.summary: Construct unsigned xStock → USDC tx + sign URL.

compliance.stablecoinIssuerInterest: We never custody or issue. The yield path uses Ondo USDY (a registered security under non-US prospectus), not stablecoin issuer interest — unaffected by GENIUS / CLARITY Act restrictions.
compliance.usPersons: Restricted by issuers (Backed, Ondo). We do not onboard users; users connect their existing wallet.
